privileged_info_summary: The task targets three WooCommerce products with verified shipping dimensions: Oak Coffee Table (SKU: FURN-OCT-001, weight 18.5 kg, dimensions 110x60x45 cm), Ceramic Vase (SKU: DECOR-VASE-002, weight 1.2 kg, dimensions 15x15x35 cm), and Linen Curtains (SKU: HOME-CURT-003, weight 0.8 kg, dimensions 40x30x5 cm). All metadata values match the verifier's hardcoded targets and the task description. The products are created synthetically during setup using WP-CLI and their shipping metadata is explicitly cleared to start fresh.
